Read @Docs/AgToosa_Revert.md and execute the git-aware rollback workflow.

Arguments provided: $ARGUMENTS

Use $ARGUMENTS to identify the phase or task to roll back to (e.g. "spec", "build task 3", a commit hash, or a branch name). If no argument is provided, ask the user which phase or commit to revert to before proceeding.

This is an optional utility command — most modern AI tools have built-in checkpoints. Use this when you need deeper rollback control across AgToosa phases.
